poll.question: They're trusting each other now. Should they talk about their fears tonight—or protect one more night of peace?

options.label: Talk tonight
options.desc: Honesty now, before doubt takes root.

options.label: Hold the peace
options.desc: One more night of safety. Let hope breathe.

options.label: Judy confides first
options.desc: She opens up to Marcus alone first.

in_play.label: Talk about it
in_play.desc: Words make this real. You've trusted so far by being honest—keep going
